sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88937" key="proseggela/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεγγελάω</orth>, <sense id="n88937.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">laugh at</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προσγελάω</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:330" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">330</biblScope> </bibl> (ii <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:p.449" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.449</biblScope> </bibl> Chambry).</sense> </entryFree>
